basic_details.job_title: DCPU Tenkasi Case Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Tenkasi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Tenkasi Case Worker Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tenkasi.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Tenkasi Route Counselor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCPU Tenkasi Route Counselor position is 21st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Route Counselor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 12th standard and possess basic computer knowledge to be eligible for the Route Counselor position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Route Counselor role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Route Counselor post is 42 years. There are no specific minimum age requirements mentioned.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Route Counselor position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Route Counselor post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 18,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Route Counselor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Route Counselor position at the District Child Protection Unit Tenkasi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the DCPU Tenkasi recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Route Counselor position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Route Counselor position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Tenkasi, which is https://tenkasi.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 559/DCPU/2023-CW.
